greeting:
Hi! I'm your PocketCare companion. I can help you plan a purchase, set up goals and budgets, make sense of your spending, or split expenses with friends — all from your own data.

Here are a few things you could try:
suggestions: What can you help me with?
I want to buy an iPhone in the Diwali sale — help me plan for it.
Can I afford a ₹40,000 trip in 3 months?
Set up a monthly budget for eating out.
How do I split rent with my flatmates?
Who owes me money right now, and how much?
Create a Goa trip so I can split expenses with friends.
title: Ask PocketCare
premiumFeature: The AI assistant is a Premium feature
premiumBody: Plan purchases and savings in plain language, get concrete numeric plans from your own data, and let it set up goals and budgets for you.
landingIntro: Plan a purchase or savings goal in plain language. Only an aggregated summary of your finances is shared — never individual transactions. The assistant can make mistakes: it's here to help you think, so double-check important numbers and use your own judgment.
noChats: No saved chats yet — start your first one above.
privacyBody: We never share PII or email. Anthropic is contractually bound to NOT use your data for model training. However, please avoid typing personally identifiable information (PII) like account numbers or exact names in the chat.
outPaidBold: You've used all your AI prompts for this cycle.
outPaidRest: Buy a credit top-up to keep going — credits never expire.
outFreeBold: You've used all your free AI prompts.
outFreeRest: AI credit top-ups are available on the Lite and Pro plans — upgrade to keep going, then you can buy credits anytime.
composerPlaceholder: Ask anything, or tap the mic to speak…
errDefault: Sorry — I couldn't get a response. Please try again.
errNotConfigured: The assistant isn't set up yet on this deployment (the AI key is missing).
errModel: The configured AI model isn't available on your account. Set the ASSISTANT_MODEL secret to a valid Anthropic model id (e.g. claude-3-5-haiku-20241022).
errNetwork: I couldn't reach the assistant — check your connection and try again.
